title: Explain why near-dead or near-resolved MLB markets could still receive actionable confidence
track: Track B — model audit / market awareness
objective: Identify why near-resolved or near-dead markets can still produce actionable recommendations or confidence, and determine whether the issue is missing market awareness, missing sanity layers, or malformed confidence use.
paper_only_note: This is paper-only / observation-mode work. No model implementation or live strategy change is authorized from this task.
forbidden_actions: Open implementation work from this audit alone
required_work: 2. Trace how market price/extreme state interacts with model outputs and bridge logic.
3. Identify whether the failure is due to missing market-price awareness, missing sanity suppression, or malformed confidence use.
4. Produce a root-cause classification with evidence only.
verification: Separate observed, proven, likely, and ruled out
